---
pagetitle: "Publications & Preprints"
listing:
  - id: publications
    template: ../_templates/publications.ejs
    contents: ../_data/publications.yml
description: |
  Reference to my publications from 2017.
format:
  html:        
    include-in-header:
      text: <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/academicons/css/academicons.min.css">    
---


::: {#publications}
:::
